technicalSEO.title: White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame - Plastic Sidewalk Sign
technicalSEO.metaDescription: Discover the White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame, a durable plastic sidewalk sign perfect for versatile outdoor advertising. Easy to set up and weather-resistant.

White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame for Outdoor Business Advertising

Durable Plastic A-Frame with Custom Printed Signs & Weather-Resistant Installation

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Complete Kit - Includes A-Frame Hardware + 2 Custom Printed Signs (24" x 36") Replacement Signs Only - 2 Custom Printed Signs (24" x 36") Replacement Hardware Only - White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Stand PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Complete Signicade A-Frame with Custom Printed Signage

The White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame provides professional outdoor advertising for restaurants, retail stores, and business storefronts. This weather-resistant plastic frame accommodates two 24" x 36" custom printed signs for maximum visibility and advertising impact.

Each A-frame features molded handles for easy transport and can be filled with water or sand for enhanced outdoor stability. The foldable design allows compact storage while maintaining durability for year-round outdoor use.

Complete Kit Includes:

  • 1 White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Hardware
  • 2 Full-Color Printed Signs (24" x 36")
  • Weather-resistant construction for outdoor installations
  • Foldable design with carrying handles

Ideal Applications:

  • Restaurant menu displays and daily specials
  • Business grand opening announcements
  • Church service times and events
  • Storefront sales and promotional advertising
  • Real estate open house signage
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Signicade A-Frame Materials & Weather-Resistant Construction

The Signicade Deluxe A-Frame combines durable plastic hardware with professional-grade printed signage materials designed for outdoor business advertising.

A-Frame Hardware Material:

  • High-impact plastic construction
  • Weather-resistant and maintenance-free
  • Will not rust, splinter, or fade
  • Fillable base for water or sand stabilization
  • Integrated molded handles for easy transport

Printed Sign Material:

  • 4mm corrugated plastic substrate
  • Hollow flute construction (similar to cardboard)
  • Lightweight yet waterproof design
  • Digital printing for sharp, vibrant colors
  • UV-resistant inks for fade protection

The combination of durable plastic hardware and waterproof corrugated plastic signs ensures your A-frame advertising performs reliably in all weather conditions.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Signicade A-Frame Installation & Setup for Outdoor Use

The Signicade Deluxe A-Frame offers versatile setup options for stable outdoor advertising installations.

Standard Setup Features:

  • Tool-free assembly and sign insertion
  • Foldable design for easy storage
  • Self-standing operation on flat surfaces
  • Dual-sided advertising capability

Enhanced Stability Options:

  • Water-fillable base for windy conditions
  • Sand-fillable base for maximum stability
  • Molded handles for repositioning throughout the day
  • Compact fold-flat storage between uses

Installation Recommendations:

  • Position on level surfaces for optimal stability
  • Fill base with water or sand in windy locations
  • Store indoors during severe weather
  • Clean frame with standard cleaning products

Each A-frame accommodates different messaging on each side, allowing welcome messages for entering customers and thank you messages for departing guests.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom A-Frame Production & Turnaround Times

Signicade A-Frame orders include both hardware and custom printed signage with flexible production scheduling to meet your advertising timeline.

Standard Production Options:

  • 1-Day Rush Production: Next business day completion
  • 2-Day Standard: Optimal balance of speed and value
  • 3-Day Production: Most popular option for planned campaigns
  • 5-Day Economy: Budget-friendly extended timeline

Production Process:

  • Artwork review and approval confirmation
  • Digital printing of custom sign graphics
  • Quality control inspection
  • A-frame hardware and signs packaging
  • Shipment preparation and tracking

Special Considerations:

  • Double-sided designs may require artwork approval for both sides
  • Rush orders must be placed before 2PM CST
  • Complex artwork may require additional production time
  • Holiday schedules may affect production timelines

Production time begins after final artwork approval and payment processing completion.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Payment & Ordering Options

Multiple payment and ordering methods are available for Signicade A-Frame purchases, accommodating both individual businesses and corporate accounts.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover)
  • PayPal and PayPal Business accounts
  • Corporate purchase orders (approved accounts)
  • Business checks for established customers
  • Net payment terms for qualified businesses

Ordering Options:

  • Complete Kit: A-Frame hardware plus 2 custom printed signs
  • Replacement Signs: New graphics for existing hardware
  • Hardware Only: Additional A-Frame stands for multiple locations
  • Bulk Orders: Multiple units with quantity pricing

Business Account Benefits:

  • Streamlined reorder process for repeat campaigns
  • Dedicated customer service representatives
  • Custom pricing for high-volume orders
  • Artwork template storage for future orders

Contact customer service for custom quotes on multiple A-frame installations or ongoing advertising campaigns.

Shipping Guidelines for Signicade A-Frame Delivery

Signicade A-Frame orders ship nationwide with multiple delivery options to ensure timely arrival for your advertising campaigns.

Standard Shipping Options:

  • Ground Shipping: 3-7 business days, most economical option
  • Expedited Shipping: 2-3 business days for faster delivery
  • Express Shipping: 1-2 business days for urgent orders
  • Overnight Delivery: Next business day arrival

Packaging & Protection:

  • A-Frame hardware ships in protective packaging
  • Custom printed signs include moisture protection
  • Fragile handling labels applied to prevent damage
  • Tracking information provided for all shipments

Delivery Considerations:

  • Residential delivery available to business and home addresses
  • Signature confirmation recommended for high-value orders
  • Multiple A-frame orders may ship in separate packages
  • Commercial addresses typically receive faster delivery

Shipping Restrictions:

  • Some remote locations may require additional delivery time
  • Weather conditions may affect shipping schedules
  • Holiday periods may extend standard delivery times

Free shipping promotions may be available for orders above minimum purchase amounts.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business & Restaurant Uses for Outdoor A-Frame Signs

Signicade A-Frame signs provide versatile advertising solutions for businesses seeking to attract foot traffic and communicate with potential customers.

Restaurant & Food Service Applications:

  • Daily menu specials and featured dishes
  • Happy hour promotions and drink specials
  • Outdoor dining availability announcements
  • Seasonal menu changes and new offerings
  • Curbside pickup and delivery information

Retail & Business Storefront Uses:

  • Grand opening celebrations and ribbon cutting events
  • Seasonal sales and clearance promotions
  • New product launches and featured merchandise
  • Store hours and contact information
  • Special event announcements and workshops

Professional Service Applications:

  • Real estate open house scheduling
  • Medical and dental practice announcements
  • Legal and accounting service promotions
  • Automotive service specials and oil change offers
  • Beauty salon and spa treatment advertising

Community & Organization Uses:

  • Church service times and special events
  • School fundraising and enrollment information
  • Non-profit awareness campaigns
  • Political campaign messaging and candidate promotion
  • Community event announcements

The dual-sided design allows different messages for arriving and departing customers, maximizing advertising effectiveness.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Artwork Requirements for Custom Sign Printing

Professional A-frame sign printing requires properly prepared artwork files to ensure optimal print quality and color accuracy for your outdoor advertising.

File Specifications:

  • Dimensions: 24" x 36" finished size plus bleed area
  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum for quality outdoor viewing
  • File Formats: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPEG/PNG
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate print color matching
  • Bleed Area: 0.125" beyond trim line on all edges

Design Recommendations:

  • Bold, readable fonts for distance viewing
  • High contrast colors for outdoor visibility
  • Simple layouts with clear messaging hierarchy
  • Avoid fine details that may not reproduce clearly
  • Consider viewing distance when sizing text elements

Artwork Submission Process:

  • Upload files during online ordering process
  • Email artwork files to customer service
  • Professional design services available upon request
  • Artwork approval confirmation before production begins

Double-Sided Design Options:

  • Different messages for each A-frame side
  • Welcome/goodbye messaging for customer flow
  • Menu/hours combination for restaurants
  • Promotional offers with contact information

Free design consultation is available to optimize your A-frame artwork for maximum outdoor advertising impact.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom A-Frame Signs for Your Business Today

Transform your business visibility with professional Signicade A-Frame signs designed for outdoor advertising success. Each complete kit includes durable weather-resistant hardware and two custom printed signs to maximize your marketing impact.

Choose from flexible production timelines ranging from 1-day rush service to 5-day economy options. Our in-house customer service team provides personalized support throughout the design and ordering process.

Why Choose Professional A-Frame Advertising:

  • Immediate Visibility: Attract foot traffic with eye-catching outdoor signage
  • Flexible Messaging: Update printed signs for seasonal promotions and events
  • Cost-Effective Marketing: Long-term advertising solution with one-time investment
  • Professional Appearance: High-quality materials and printing enhance business image

Our customer service team consists of friendly, professional graphic designers ready to assist with artwork optimization, size selection, and order customization. Track your order progress with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

Contact our customer service representatives for double-sided printing options, bulk order pricing, or custom installation requirements. We're here to help create the perfect A-frame advertising solution for your business.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What is an A-frame sign (sidewalk sign)?

An A-frame sign—also called a sidewalk sign or sandwich board—is a foldable, freestanding sign used to advertise in high foot-traffic areas like storefronts, strip malls, outdoor restaurants, and near parking lots.

Are these A-frames suitable for outdoor use year-round?

Yes. These A-frames are made from durable plastic that won't rust or splinter, and the frame can be filled with sand or water for added outdoor stability in various weather conditions.

Does the Signicade A-frame include one or two printed inserts?

The complete kit includes two (2) full-color printed signs, sized 24" × 36" (one for each side of the A-frame).

What colors is the Signicade A-frame available in?

The Signicade Deluxe A-frame is available in white only. The printed signs can be customized with any colors and designs.

Do you offer other A-frame sizes or styles?

Yes. In addition to the Signicade Deluxe A-frame (24" × 36" sign size), other A-frame sizes and styles are available. Contact customer service for additional options and sizing information.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
